scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const d of ['notification','settings']){const p='src/renderer/'+d;fs.mkdirSync('dist/renderer/'+d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(p)){if(f.endsWith('.html')||f.endsWith('.css'))fs.copyFileSync(p+'/'+f,'dist/renderer/'+d+'/'+f);}}"
